sql_query.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'responded')::int AS responded, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'responded' AND updated_at > now() - interval '7 days')::int AS responded_this_week, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(reactions->>'not_alone','0')::int) FILTER (WHERE wall_status = 'approved'), 0)::int AS felt_less_alone FROM _inquiry
